PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX ns: <http://rdf.freebase.com/ns/>

SELECT ?war WHERE {
  ns:m.0f8l9c ns:military.military_combatant.military_conflicts ?combatantGroup .
  ?combatantGroup ns:military.military_combatant_group.conflict ?war .
  ?war ns:time.event.end_date ?endDate .
  BIND(xsd:date(?endDate) AS ?warEndDate) .
  BIND(year(?warEndDate) * 10000 + month(?warEndDate) * 100 + day(?warEndDate) AS ?warDateNum) .
  BIND(1809 * 10000 + 7 * 100 + 31 AS ?targetDateNum) .
  BIND(abs(?warDateNum - ?targetDateNum) AS ?dateDiff) .
} ORDER BY ?dateDiff LIMIT 1

sparql:
PREFIX uom: <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>

PREFIX ns: <http://rdf.freebase.com/ns/>

SELECT ?inspiration WHERE {
  ns:m.0bv62 ?p ?inspiration .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?p)), "inspiration") || 
         CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?p)), "motivation") || 
         CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?p)), "reason") || 
         CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?p)), "influence") || 
         CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?p)), "early"))
}
LIMIT 10
